title: RSC Bhubaneswar Trainee Craft Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
organization: Regional Science Centre, Bhubaneswar (Under National Council of Science Museums - NCSM)
short_info: RSC Bhubaneswar is recruiting 04 Trainee (Crafts) posts on contractual basis.

age_limit.details: Age limit not specified in the advertisement. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed advertisement or check at the time of Walk-in.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC / Matriculation with ITI Certificate in relevant trade from a Government recognized institution. Candidates who passed ITI on or after 2023 are eligible.

salary_details.duration: 1 Year (extendable for another year based on performance)
salary_details.job guarantee: No job guarantee after completion of traineeship

selection_process: Selection will be done through Walk-in Aptitude Test followed by Trade Test on the same day.
Document Verification from 09:00 AM Aptitude Test (Written Test) from 10:00 AM Trade Test for candidates qualifying in Written Test
how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in recruitment. No online application is required.
Candidates must appear directly at the venue with:
Duly filled Application Form (download from www.rscbhubaneswar.org or www.ncsm.gov.in)
Original + Self-attested copies of all certificates & mark sheets
important_instructions: Candidates must report by 09:00 AM for document verification. Late comers after 09:30 AM will not be allowed. Only candidates qualifying in Written Aptitude Test will be called for Trade Test. There is absolutely no job guarantee after completion of traineeship. Decision of the authority of RSC, Bhubaneswar will be final.
